title: NetworkPolicyManager setUidPolicy() shell-level arbitrary network policy
notes: Shell (uid 2000) holds MANAGE_NETWORK_POLICY. ADB-connected attacker can set arbitrary network policies for any UID — restrict background data, block metered access. Combined with other shell-level attacks for persistent DoS. Also: getUidPolicy()/getUidsWithPolicy() leaks network policy flags for any UID without caller check.
